text: Our refund policy allows customers to request a full refund within 30 days of purchase if the product is unused and in its original packaging.
To reset your account password, go to the login page, click 'Forgot Password', and follow the instructions sent to your registered email address.
Shipping usually takes between 3 to 5 business days for domestic orders and 7 to 14 business days for international deliveries.
Our mobile application supports both Android and iOS devices and requires at least Android 10 or iOS 14 to run smoothly.

The customer support team is available Monday to Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM IST through email, chat, and phone support.
